data.title: POSCO Holdings Unveils Triple-Core Growth and Capital Strategy at 2026 CEO Investor Day
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

An announcement from POSCO ( (PKX) ) is now available.

On July 2, 2026, POSCO Holdings outlined a mid- to long-term portfolio transformation and financial strategy at its CEO Investor Day in Seoul. The group plans a “Triple-Core” portfolio built around Industrial, Strategic and Energy Resources, targeting overseas crude steel capacity of 10 million tons by 2031, lithium production of 173,000 tons by 2033 to rank among the top five global producers, and a broader footprint in rare earths, specialty gases, LNG and renewable energy.

Management set 2028 financial goals of KRW 87.9 trillion in consolidated revenue and KRW 6.7 trillion in operating profit, supported by KRW 29.1 trillion in investment from 2026 to 2028. POSCO also announced a shareholder value-focused capital policy, aiming for a 35–40% payout of adjusted net income via dividends and buybacks, reducing holding-company discounts by monetizing some listed subsidiaries, and targeting a price-to-book ratio of at least 1.0x by 2028, signaling a bid to re-rate the stock and strengthen its strategic positioning in global resource markets.

Spark’s Take on PKX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PKX is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (thin margins, low ROE, and negative free cash flow) and bearish technicals (price below major DMAs with negative MACD and very weak RSI/Stoch). Valuation is also a headwind due to the high P/E, partially tempered by a moderate dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on PKX stock,
click here.

More about POSCO

POSCO Holdings Inc. is a South Korea-based industrial group rooted in steelmaking and increasingly focused on critical materials and energy. The company supplies crude steel globally, with expansion plans in high-growth markets such as India and the U.S., and is building positions in lithium, battery materials, rare earths, specialty gases, LNG and renewables to become a national supplier of critical resources.

Average Trading Volume: 330,735

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $15B

data.title: Easy Smart Group Revamps Independent Board Seat and Committees
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

The latest update is out from Easy Smart Group Holdings Limited ( (HK:2442) ).

Easy Smart Group Holdings Limited has announced changes to its board of directors and committee composition, underscoring the importance of independent oversight in its corporate governance framework. The company continues to align its governance practices with Hong Kong listing rules by rotating independent directors through critical board committees.

Independent non-executive director Dr. Gong Zhaolong has resigned due to personal commitments, stepping down from the Audit, Nomination and Remuneration Committees. He is replaced by semiconductor industry veteran Dr. Gong Bin, who joins the board and the same three committees, bringing nearly two decades of sector experience and multiple policy and academic roles that may strengthen the Group’s strategic and compliance capabilities.

Dr. Gong Bin’s appointment is for an initial two-year term, subject to annual general meeting re-election and subsequent rotation at least once every three years under the company’s articles. His role, remunerated with an annual director’s fee of HK$180,000, is structured to preserve independence and is expected to support the company’s governance, risk oversight and long-term strategic positioning for shareholders and other stakeholders.

More about Easy Smart Group Holdings Limited

Easy Smart Group Holdings Limited, incorporated in the Cayman Islands and listed in Hong Kong, operates through a group structure referred to as the Group. The company is overseen by a Board that relies on independent non-executive directors to staff key governance committees, including the Audit, Nomination and Remuneration Committees, in line with Hong Kong listing requirements.

The Group emphasizes compliance with the Rules Governing the Listing of Securities on The Stock Exchange of Hong Kong Limited, particularly regarding director independence and board rotation. Director fees are benchmarked to qualifications, experience and prevailing market conditions, and reviewed periodically by the Remuneration Committee to maintain market-aligned governance standards.

Average Trading Volume: 681,352

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$28.78B

data.title: Boliden Confirms Talks on Potential Acquisition of Nexa Resources Stake
data.description:

An update from Boliden AB ( (SE:BOL) ) is now available.

Boliden has acknowledged market speculation by confirming it is in discussions with Nexa Resources and its majority owner Votorantim regarding a potential acquisition of Votorantim’s stake in Nexa. The company emphasized that there is no certainty any transaction will occur or what its terms might be and said further announcements will be made if and when appropriate.

The statement, made under EU Market Abuse Regulation disclosure requirements, signals Boliden’s interest in expanding its footprint in the metals sector through a possible strategic deal. While details remain undefined, any acquisition of Nexa shares could reshape Boliden’s operational scale and regional presence, and will be closely watched by investors and industry stakeholders for its implications on the competitive landscape.

with a SEK510.00 price target.

More about Boliden AB

Boliden AB is a European producer of sustainable metals with operations spanning exploration, mining, smelting and recycling. Guided by its values of care, courage and responsibility, the group employs around 8,000 people and generates annual revenues of approximately SEK 90 billion. Boliden’s shares are listed on the Large Cap segment of Nasdaq OMX Stockholm.

data.title: Trinity Biotech Clinical Data Validates CGM+ Advantage in Tackling False Low Glucose Alerts
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Trinity Biotech ( (TRIB) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On July 2, 2026, Trinity Biotech reported clinical trial results from a pre-pivotal study of its next-generation CGM+ wearable biosensor platform in insulin-dependent people with diabetes. Analysis of about 5,000 hours of wear time showed CGM+ can algorithmically distinguish nocturnal compression-related false low glucose readings from true blood glucose lows by combining glucose data with additional physiological signals.

The company argues that this multi-sensor capability addresses a major limitation of conventional glucose-only CGM systems, which can generate sleep-disrupting false alarms and drive avoidable glucose variability, with knock-on effects for automated insulin delivery decisions. Management says the findings validate CGM+’s platform strategy, strengthen its differentiation in the roughly $15 billion global CGM market, and will be incorporated as the product advances toward pivotal trials and regulatory submission.

Spark’s Take on TRIB Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TRIB is a Neutral.

TRIB scores low primarily due to very weak financial performance (multi-year losses, negative equity, rising debt, and ongoing cash burn). Technicals further pressure the score as the stock trades well below major moving averages with negative momentum indicators. Valuation is also constrained because the company is unprofitable (negative P/E) and there is no dividend yield data to offset risk.

To see Spark’s full report on TRIB stock,
click here.

More about Trinity Biotech

Trinity Biotech plc is a commercial-stage biotechnology company focused on human diagnostics and diabetes management solutions, including wearable biosensors. It develops, acquires, manufactures, and markets diagnostic systems for point-of-care and clinical laboratory segments, and has expanded into CGM and advanced liquid cooling for AI data centers through acquisitions and its Trinovium subsidiary.

The company sells directly in the U.S. and via international distributors and strategic partners in over 75 countries worldwide. Its CGM+ platform targets the global continuous glucose monitoring market, seeking differentiation with multi-sensor, AI-driven analytics that add physiological context to traditional glucose data.

Average Trading Volume: 1,284,055

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $6.9M

Miji International Holdings Limited ( (HK:1715) ) has issued an update.

AI Health Technology Limited has detailed the composition of its board of directors and clarified the roles of its executive and independent non-executive members. The structure underscores a standard governance framework aimed at balancing management leadership with independent oversight for a Hong Kong-listed health technology company.

The company has also outlined membership of its three key board committees: audit, nomination and remuneration. Independent non-executive directors chair these committees, signaling an emphasis on transparent financial reporting, robust director selection processes and structured oversight of executive pay, which are important for investor confidence and regulatory compliance.

The announcement confirms Chairman Zhao Jie and CEO Maeck Can Yue as members of the board committees, with varying responsibilities across audit, nomination and remuneration functions. This allocation of roles is likely to shape how strategic decisions, risk management and corporate governance are coordinated at the board level, affecting stakeholders’ perception of accountability and control.

More about Miji International Holdings Limited

AI Health Technology Limited, incorporated in the Cayman Islands and listed in Hong Kong under stock code 1715, operates in the health technology sector. The company is governed by a board comprising executive and independent non-executive directors, reflecting a conventional corporate governance structure for a Hong Kong-listed entity.

Executive leadership is headed by Chairman Zhao Jie and Chief Executive Officer Maeck Can Yue, alongside executive director Wang Jian. Independent oversight is provided by non-executive directors Shen Shujing, Lin Dongming and Zhang Yuanjie, who play key roles in board committees that supervise audit, nomination and remuneration matters.

data.title: PomDoctor Shifts to Predictive Healthcare Infrastructure With Strategic Upgrade
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

An update from PomDoctor Ltd. Unsponsored ADR ( (POM) ) is now available.

On July 2, 2026, PomDoctor Limited announced a strategic upgrade that repositions the business from a traditional online healthcare platform to a foundational infrastructure provider for predictive healthcare data and services. The move centers on integrating wearable devices, AI analytics, physician services, real-world data and healthcare payment networks into a closed-loop ecosystem aimed at continuous, personalized and proactive care.

Management framed the shift as a response to structural trends including the rising chronic disease burden, advances in AI and remote monitoring technologies, and evolving reimbursement models that favor prevention and long-term outcomes. By building a multi-dimensional health data platform and diversified revenue model beyond pharmaceutical sales, PomDoctor seeks to strengthen its industry positioning in digital medicine and support global expansion, with the U.S. cited as a key next step.

The company’s “healthcare intelligence flywheel” concept links real-time data capture via wearables to AI-driven risk prediction and physician intervention, reinforced by insurance integration to enable value-based care. As platform usage grows, PomDoctor expects its data assets and AI capabilities to compound, potentially enhancing service quality and attracting more stakeholders across the healthcare ecosystem.

Spark’s Take on POM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, POM is a Underperform.

The score is driven primarily by weak financial performance: widening losses, negative equity, rising debt, and sharply worsening cash burn in 2025. Technicals also detract, with the stock trading below major moving averages. Valuation signals are limited because the company is unprofitable (negative P/E) and provides no dividend yield data.

To see Spark’s full report on POM stock,
click here.

More about PomDoctor Ltd. Unsponsored ADR

PomDoctor Limited (NASDAQ: POM) is a China-based digital healthcare company specializing in online medical services for chronic disease patients. Leveraging physician networks, wearable technologies, artificial intelligence and healthcare payment systems, it focuses on building predictive, continuous and data-driven healthcare solutions for patients, providers and other ecosystem participants.

The company operates a leading online medical services platform for chronic diseases, integrating real-world health data to support personalized care. Its strategic emphasis is on developing healthcare infrastructure that enables long-term disease management and improved outcomes rather than episodic consultations and pharmaceutical sales.

data.title: China Vanke Pledges RMB1.14 Billion in Receivables to Secure Shenzhen Metro Loan
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

China Vanke Co ( (HK:2202) ) has issued an update.

China Vanke has entered into a new pledge agreement involving its controlling subsidiary Beijing Zhongsheng Xingjian Real Estate Development Co., Ltd. and substantial shareholder Shenzhen Metro Group. The agreement leverages accounts receivable from a specific project, underscoring the developer’s continued dependence on asset-backed financing to maintain stability in its capital structure.

Under the pledge agreement, Beijing Zhongsheng Xingjian will pledge RMB1,140 million in accounts receivable to Shenzhen Metro Group as security for an existing loan of the same amount to China Vanke. All parties will complete pledge registration and arrange repayments according to the loan and pledge terms, formalizing the connected transaction and providing additional assurance to lenders and other stakeholders regarding the company’s repayment performance.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2202) stock is a Sell
with a HK$2.70 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on China Vanke Co stock,
see the HK:2202 Stock Forecast page.

More about China Vanke Co

China Vanke Co., Ltd. is a major Chinese real estate developer operating through controlling subsidiaries across the mainland market. The group focuses on property development and related projects, and its capital structure involves substantial shareholders such as Shenzhen Metro Group, reflecting close ties with state-linked infrastructure and urban development entities.

The company’s operations rely on project-based cash flows and receivables, and it actively uses secured financing arrangements to support liquidity and meet repayment obligations.

data.title: Audax Renovables Challenges Rival Deal in Elmera Takeover Battle
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

The latest announcement is out from Audax Renovables SA ( (ES:ADX) ).

Audax Renovables has reiterated its interest in acquiring all outstanding shares of Norwegian electricity retailer Elmera Group ASA through an all‑cash voluntary offer of NOK 41.20 per share, backed by committed financing and designed with a relatively low acceptance threshold to maximise completion certainty for Elmera shareholders. However, the Elmera board has opted to proceed with an alternative transaction involving a combination of two major Norwegian electricity retailers, a deal Audax warns could face competition concerns and greater regulatory risk, while the Spanish group signals it will reassess capital allocation as it balances this opportunity against other long‑term strategic options for shareholders.

Audax argues its proposed transaction offers lower execution complexity and limited regulatory risk compared with the rival deal, positioning itself as a new, well‑funded entrant to the Nordic power retail market. The company’s insistence on due diligence access and emphasis on shareholder value highlight ongoing strategic manoeuvring in the sector, as consolidation pressures and competition scrutiny shape the landscape for utilities, regulators and consumers in Norway and beyond.

More about Audax Renovables SA

Audax Renovables, S.A. is a listed Spanish energy company focused on renewable power generation and electricity retailing, with an expanding presence in European markets. The group actively pursues strategic investments and acquisitions to strengthen its position in liberalised power markets, including the Nordic region.

Average Trading Volume: 339,546

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: €548.7M

data.title: New Century Healthcare Refreshes Board With Independent Healthcare Investor
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

New Century Healthcare Holding Co. Ltd. ( (HK:1518) ) just unveiled an announcement.

New Century Healthcare Holding Co. Ltd. announced changes to its board, with non-executive director Mr. Wang Siye resigning effective June 30, 2026, citing work adjustments. The board noted that Mr. Wang has no disagreements with directors and expressed gratitude for his contributions, indicating a smooth and orderly transition in governance.

The company appointed Mr. Qiu Xiang as a new non-executive director effective July 2, 2026, bringing extensive healthcare investment experience and multiple directorships in medical and biotech firms. Mr. Qiu will serve an initial three-year term without remuneration, reinforcing the board’s focus on sector expertise and potentially strengthening New Century Healthcare’s strategic positioning and investor confidence.

The board stated that Mr. Qiu has no prior roles within the group, no relationships with existing management or major shareholders, and no shareholding in the company, underscoring his independence. This appointment aligns with listing rule requirements and highlights the firm’s attention to corporate governance, transparency, and oversight as it continues to operate in the competitive Chinese healthcare market.

More about New Century Healthcare Holding Co. Ltd.

New Century Healthcare Holding Co. Ltd. operates in the healthcare sector, providing medical services in China. The company is listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange and is overseen by a board that includes executive and non-executive directors, reflecting its focus on governance and strategic oversight in a regulated market.

The group’s leadership structure incorporates non-executive directors from investment and healthcare-related backgrounds. This board composition underscores its emphasis on industry expertise and capital markets experience as it navigates the evolving Chinese healthcare landscape and regulatory environment.

data.title: Sparebanken Norge Calls Perpetual Bond SBNOR113 PRO for 2026 Redemption
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Sparebanken Vest ( (SPIZF) ) has provided an announcement.

Sparebanken Norge has decided to exercise its call option on the perpetual bond loan SBNOR113 PRO, identified by ISIN NO0011032328, and will redeem it at par value. The bond’s maturity will effectively be set to July 23, 2026, which may adjust the bank’s funding profile and could influence investors’ expectations around its future capital management and issuance strategy.

The redemption at a price of 100 indicates investors will receive full principal back, underscoring the bank’s intent to actively manage its outstanding hybrid or perpetual instruments. This move aligns with continuing obligations in the Norwegian market and signals Sparebanken Norge’s focus on maintaining regulatory compliance while potentially reshaping its long-term funding and capital structure mix.

More about Sparebanken Vest

Sparebanken Norge is a Norwegian financial institution operating in the banking sector, with a focus on treasury and funding activities in the domestic capital market. The bank issues bond loans as part of its capital structure and actively manages these instruments to optimize funding costs and regulatory capital requirements.

Average Trading Volume: 197,061

Current Market Cap: NOK31.94B
